# Figure 1a: Sankey diagram showing information of all the TB signatures up to June 2025
# last modified: 12/18/25
# author: Kewalin Samart

```{r load libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r microarray signature info}
microarray_signatures_df <- read_tsv(here("data/signatures/microarray_TB_signature_run_info.tsv"))
microarray_signatures_info <- microarray_signatures_df[microarray_signatures_df$signature == 1, ]
microarray_signatures_info$technology <- "microarray"

rnaseq_signatures_df <- read_tsv(here("data/signatures/RNAseq_TB_signature_run_info.tsv"))
rnaseq_signatures_info <- rnaseq_signatures_df[rnaseq_signatures_df$signature == 1, ]
rnaseq_signatures_info$technology <- "RNAseq"
```

```{r combine signature info}
all_signatures_info <- rbind(microarray_signatures_info, rnaseq_signatures_info)

write_tsv(all_signatures_info, file = here("data/signatures/202506_TB_signatures_info.tsv"))
```

```{r Sankey diagram}
library(networkD3)

df_unique <- all_signatures_info %>%
  mutate(
    signature = SIGNATURE_NAME,
    tissue_cell_type = tissue_cell_type,
    origin = sample_origin,
    origin_type = tissue_category,
    TB = tb_status
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(signature, tissue_cell_type, origin, origin_type, TB, technology)

cell_counts <- df_unique %>% dplyr::count(tissue_cell_type)
keep_types <- cell_counts %>%
  filter(n >= 2) %>%
  pull(tissue_cell_type)
df_unique$tissue_cell_type <- ifelse(df_unique$tissue_cell_type %in% keep_types,
  df_unique$tissue_cell_type,
  "Other tissue/cell types"
)

link1 <- df_unique %>%
  dplyr::count(tissue_cell_type, origin) %>%
  dplyr::rename(source = tissue_cell_type, target = origin, value = n)
link2 <- df_unique %>%
  dplyr::count(origin, origin_type) %>%
  dplyr::rename(source = origin, target = origin_type, value = n)
link3 <- df_unique %>%
  dplyr::count(origin_type, TB) %>%
  dplyr::rename(source = origin_type, target = TB, value = n)
link4 <- df_unique %>%
  dplyr::count(TB, technology) %>%
  dplyr::rename(source = TB, target = technology, value = n)

links_all <- bind_rows(link1, link2, link3, link4)

sig_paths <- df_unique %>%
  dplyr::select(signature, tissue_cell_type, origin, origin_type, TB, technology) %>%
  pivot_longer(-signature, names_to = "layer", values_to = "name") %>%
  distinct(signature, name)

all_node_counts <- sig_paths %>%
  dplyr::count(name) %>%
  dplyr::rename(total = n)

nodes <- all_node_counts %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(name, " (", total, ")")) %>%
  dplyr::select(name, label)

nodes <- all_node_counts %>%
  mutate(label = name) %>%
  mutate(
    label = dplyr::recode(
      label,
      "blood_CD14plus_monocyte_derived_macrophages_MF1" = "CD14+ MDMs MF1",
      "blood_CD14plus_monocyte_derived_macrophages_MF2" = "CD14+ MDMs MF2",
      "blood_monocyte_derived_macrophages" = "MDMs",
      "blood_PBMC" = "PBMC",
      "blood_dendritic_cells" = "Dendritic cells",
      "blood_macrophage" = "Macrophage",
      .default = label
    ),
    label = paste0(label, " (", total, ")")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(name, label)


links_all$source_id <- match(links_all$source, nodes$name) - 1
links_all$target_id <- match(links_all$target, nodes$name) - 1

sankey <- sankeyNetwork(
  Links = links_all,
  Nodes = nodes,
  Source = "source_id",
  Target = "target_id",
  Value = "value",
  NodeID = "label",
  fontSize = 15,
  nodeWidth = 30,
  nodePadding = 15,
  sinksRight = TRUE
)
```

```{r save output}
library(htmlwidgets)
library(webshot2)

saveWidget(sankey, "figure1a_sankey_plot.html", selfcontained = TRUE)

webshot(
  "figure1a_sankey_plot.html",
  "figure1a_sankey_plot.pdf",
  zoom = 2,
  vwidth = 900,
  vheight = 600
)
```
